email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator in Wilrijk. Uw omschrijving van de order-to-cash-rol voor de Nordics en Baltics sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in klantgericht werken, coördinatie en digitale tools.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto beheer ik meerdere klantprojecten tegelijk, van orderopvolging (via CRM) tot contentpublicatie. Ik ben gewend om nauw samen te werken met accountmanagers en interne teams, en ik heb een sterke affiniteit met systemen zoals SAP (via eerdere blootstelling) en data-analyse. Mijn logistieke ervaring bij Katoen Natie heeft mij geleerd accuraat en stressbestendig te werken in een snelle omgeving.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met dagelijkse verbetering). Ik ben leergierig, hands-on en klaar om bij te dragen aan uw groei.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position in Wilrijk. Your description of the order-to-cash role for the Nordics and Baltics aligns perfectly with my experience in customer-oriented work, coordination, and digital tools.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects simultaneously, from order follow-up (via CRM) to content publication. I am used to collaborating closely with account managers and internal teams, and I have a strong affinity with systems like SAP (through prior exposure) and data analysis. My logistics experience at Katoen Natie taught me to work accurately and stress-resiliently in a fast-paced environment.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (improving daily). I am eager to learn, hands-on, and ready to contribute to your growth.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales Support Administrator bij uw bedrijf in Wilrijk. Uw omschrijving van de order-to-cash-rol voor de Nordics en Baltics spreekt mij enorm aan, omdat ik graag een centrale schakel ben tussen klanten, accountmanagers en interne afdelingen.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van meerdere klantprojecten. Ik coördineer met accountmanagers en interne teams, volg orders op via CRM, en zorg voor tijdige communicatie. Mijn ervaring met WordPress, Elementor en data-analyse (Google Analytics, SEMrush) heeft mij geleerd gestructureerd en nauwkeurig te werken. Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie in een logistieke omgeving gewerkt, waar ik leerde omgaan met hoge volumes en strakke deadlines.

Uw vacature vraagt om een hands-on persoon die het order-to-cash-proces beheert, containerbeladingen optimaliseert en accountmanagers ondersteunt. Ik herken mij in dit profiel: ik ben probleemoplossend, nauwkeurig en stressbestendig. Mijn technische achtergrond helpt mij snel nieuwe systemen zoals SAP onder de knie te krijgen. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Wat mij aanspreekt in uw bedrijf is de internationale dynamiek en de focus op groei. Ik ben gemotiveerd om bij te dragen aan efficiënte processen en klanttevredenheid. Ik ben flexibel, leergierig en klaar om te starten.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position at your company in Wilrijk. Your description of the order-to-cash role for the Nordics and Baltics appeals to me greatly, as I enjoy being a central link between customers, account managers, and internal departments.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing multiple client projects. I coordinate with account managers and internal teams, follow up on orders via CRM, and ensure timely communication. My experience with WordPress, Elementor, and data analysis (Google Analytics, SEMrush) has taught me to work in a structured and accurate manner. Additionally, I worked at Katoen Natie in a logistics environment, where I learned to handle high volumes and tight deadlines.

Your vacancy asks for a hands-on person who manages the order-to-cash process, optimizes container loads, and supports account managers. I recognize myself in this profile: I am problem-solving, accurate, and stress-resilient. My technical background helps me quickly master new systems like SAP. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

What appeals to me about your company is the international dynamics and the focus on growth. I am motivated to contribute to efficient processes and customer satisfaction. I am flexible, eager to learn, and ready to start.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on order-to-cash experience: managing client projects, CRM follow-up, and coordination with account managers and internal teams at Episto
• Strong digital and analytical skills: Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console — ideal for reporting and optimization
• Logistics background: accurate and stress-resilient in high-volume environments (Katoen Natie)
• Technical aptitude: quick to learn new systems (SAP is a plus); experience with CMS and data tools
• Multilingual: fluent English and Turkish, Dutch B1 (actively improving)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I manage client projects end-to-end, coordinating with account managers and internal teams, following up on orders via CRM, and ensuring timely delivery. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-cash & CRM: client project management, order follow-up, CRM coordination, account manager support
- Data & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client projects from start to finish, coordinating with account managers and internal teams to ensure timely delivery
- Follow up on orders and client requests via CRM, maintaining accurate records and communication
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
